category_sources: source_facts.description says it is GNU's portable shell tool; the official GNU page describes small portable shell scripts for build and installation tasks.
display_name_sources: Official GNU page title is GNU shtool; source_facts.name is shtool.
docs_sources: Official GNU shtool page is the primary project and documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official GNU shtool page points to FTP source distribution and bug reporting, with no official source-control repository found.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists shtool and shtoolize; source_facts.description and the official GNU page describe portable shell tooling for package build/install tasks.
